home.title: Ventrys — Inventory & Light Accounting Software
home.description: Unify stock, invoicing, ledger and barcode management on one platform. Modern inventory and light accounting for growing businesses.
home.keywords: inventory management software, light accounting, barcode stock control, invoice stock integration, SME inventory, Ventrys

features.title: Features — Ventrys Stock & Invoicing
features.description: Box/piece stock, purchase & sales invoices, party ledgers, barcode scanning and reporting. Explore all Ventrys modules.
features.keywords: stock module, invoicing software, ledger tracking, barcode scanner, inventory reports, multi-company, Ventrys features

pricing.title: Pricing — Ventrys Early Access
pricing.description: 7-day free trial and premium plan. Transparent pricing for your stock and accounting needs.
pricing.keywords: inventory software pricing, free trial accounting, Ventrys pricing

contact.title: Contact — Ventrys
contact.description: Reach the Ventrys team for premium upgrade, bug reports or feature requests.
contact.keywords: Ventrys contact, premium support, feedback, feature request

hero.title: Run inventory and ledgers from a single hub
hero.subtitle: With Ventrys, control product stock, purchase & sales invoices, and customer-supplier balances in a fast, barcode-ready interface.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Say goodbye to scattered spreadsheets. Ventrys delivers integrated modules that boost operational efficiency.

stock.title: Smart inventory
stock.description: Box and piece units, critical stock alerts, and real-time warehouse visibility.

invoice.title: Purchase & sales invoices
invoice.description: Draft, post and cancel flows. Stock and ledger update automatically when posted.

ledger.title: Party ledgers
ledger.description: Customer and supplier balances, payment records and full transaction history.

barcode.title: Barcode & labels
barcode.description: Camera and USB scanner support, auto barcode generation and thermal label printing.

reports.title: Reports & dashboard
reports.description: KPI cards, charts and Excel/PDF export for data-driven decisions.

multi.title: Multi-company
multi.description: Isolated data per company. Secure teamwork with admin and staff roles.

barcode.title: Scan a barcode, add a line
barcode.description: Add invoice lines in seconds with camera or USB scanner. Stock limits apply automatically.

invoice.title: Post an invoice, stock updates itself
invoice.description: Posted sales reduce stock; purchases increase it. Ledger balances refresh instantly.

1.title: Define your products
1.description: Enter or import barcode, category, box/piece and pricing.

2.title: Create invoices
2.description: Issue purchase or sales invoices; save as draft or post.

3.title: Stock & ledger auto-sync
3.description: After posting, stock movements and ledger entries are processed automatically.

cta.title: End inventory chaos
cta.subtitle: Digitize your business with Ventrys today. Setup takes minutes.

featuresPage.heroSubtitle: Ventrys is an integrated stock and light accounting platform built for daily operations.
featuresPage.explorerSubtitle: Every module works together. Select one to see the details.

stock.title: Inventory management
stock.description: Flexible stock with box and piece units. Get instant alerts at critical levels and see warehouse status at a glance.

invoice.title: Invoicing
invoice.description: Work with drafts; when you post, stock and ledger update automatically. Payment status and PDF included.

ledger.title: Party ledgers
ledger.description: Track customer and supplier balances. Invoices and payments flow into ledger entries.

barcode.title: Barcode system
barcode.description: Camera scan, USB reader, auto barcode generation and Avery-compatible label printing.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Dashboard KPIs, sales charts and exportable reports.

global.title: Global ready
global.description: Turkish, English, German and Arabic UI. Multi-currency and dark theme.

workflow.title: Modules stay in sync
workflow.subtitle: One action keeps stock, ledger and reports aligned.

1.title: Define products
1.description: Enter barcode, category and unit info — or import via Excel.

2.title: Create invoices
2.description: Issue purchase or sales invoices; save as draft or post.

3.title: Stock & ledger update
3.description: After posting, stock movements and ledger entries are processed automatically.

4.title: Report & export
4.description: Track performance on dashboards and reports; export to PDF or Excel.

pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Start with a 7-day free trial; upgrade to premium when you need uninterrupted access.
pricingPage.trialDescription: After registration and email verification, access all core modules free for 7 days. No credit card required.
pricingPage.premiumDescription: Continue without limits after the trial. Our team will propose a plan tailored to you.
pricingPage.feedbackDescription: Report bugs, suggest features or ask questions — your message goes directly to our team.

faq.q1: How does the 7-day free trial work?
faq.a1: After sign-up and email verification you get 7 days of free access to all core modules. When it ends, only the feedback form stays open; contact us to upgrade to premium.
faq.a2: Ideal for retail, wholesale, light manufacturing and warehouse operations in SMEs.
faq.a3: Each company's data is isolated. JWT authentication and role-based access apply.
faq.a4: Yes, import your product list via Excel.
faq.q5: How do I upgrade to premium?
faq.a5: Click "Contact us for premium" on the pricing page or choose "Premium upgrade" in the contact form.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: Send us a message for premium upgrade, bug reports or feature ideas.
contactPage.formDescription: Uses the same channel as in-app feedback — your message is delivered to our team.

contactForm.name: Full name
contactForm.subject: Subject (optional)
contactForm.messageMinLength: Message must be at least 10 characters.
contactForm.sent: Your message has been sent. Thank you.
contactForm.sendFailed: Could not send message. Please try again later.

jsonLd.description: Cloud-based light accounting software for stock, invoicing, ledger and barcode management.
